<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Argument\Search; use Predis\Command\Argument\ArrayableArgument; class DropArguments implements ArrayableArgument { /** * @var array */ protected $arguments = []; /** * Drop operation that, if set, deletes the actual document hashes. * * @return $this */ public function dd(): self { $this->arguments[] = 'DD'; return $this; } /** * @return array */ public function toArray(): array { return $this->arguments; } }
